CONTENT.Club career: After spending time with the youth team and reserve team, Grandsir signed with the Troyes senior team in 2016.Garnering attention from other clubs after several impressive seasons, he moved to Monaco for €5.250m in 2018. Grandsir went on loan from Monaco to Strasbourg in January 2019 followed by another loan to Brest for the 2019–20 season.On 11 March 2021, Grandsir signed with Major League Soccer club LA Galaxy. On 23 January 2023, Grandsir returned to his native France to join Ligue 2 leaders Le Havre on a contract until the end of the season.
CONTENT.Youth career: Grandsir started his youth career in his hometown, Évreux. He eventually moved to the youth team of Troyes.
CONTENT.External links: Samuel Grandsir at the French Football Federation (in French)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 29 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Grandsir holds French and Senegalese nationalities. He represented France at the youth international level.

SUMMARY: Samuel Grandsir (born 14 August 1996) is a French-Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Le Havre.
